_comment: Trust policy for the AgentCore Runtime execution role. The aws:SourceAccount + aws:SourceArn conditions are REQUIRED to prevent the confused-deputy attack. Without these, a malicious service could impersonate bedrock-agentcore.amazonaws.com and assume this role with elevated privileges. Source: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/runtime-security-best-practices.html
